content: Ẹ jọwọ, ibeere rẹ dabi ẹni pe o dapọ awọn ọrọ imọ-jinlẹ lọpọlọpọ ti ko ni ibatan taara, gẹgẹ bi "itọka glycemic," "awọṣe rirọ," "ibamu alaisan pẹlu itọju statin," ati "kerning ti aami ilana." Ṣe o le ṣalaye diẹ sii tabi pese alaye diẹ sii lori ohun ti o fẹ lati mọ? Eyi yoo ran mi lọwọ lati fun ọ ni idahun to pe.
